rulings.Case Title: HARRY TOM ET AL VS. LEI SUN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Reasonable Attorney Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 03, 2018 line 1. PETITIONERS HARRY TOM, YOUNG TOM, KENNETH TOM and ANA TELLEZ's Motion For Award Of Reasonable Attorney Fees And Costs GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Court grants as to (1) obtaining the First Fee Recovery Order (2) litigating the appeal, and (3) seeking the present attorney fees and costs recovery order, but DENIES as to the cost of seeking the Second Fee Recovery. $46,061 to be remitted within 10 days of notice of the entry of judgement. Prevailing party to prepare an order pursuant to the tentative ruling. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIKE BUCKLEY ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A PUBLIC ENTITY ET AL
